hypothesis: If LLM agents using the ReACT architecture and recipe/measurement tools can iteratively propose experiments and receive only pressure and QCM feedback, then they will be able to infer hidden process rules—such as letter-rejection criteria in the Alien Market and underlying chemical reaction/ALP mechanisms in the simulated reactor—within a limited number of trials, with success rates that increase with model capability, experiment budget, sensor fidelity (e.g., QCM reference), and available experimental time relative to reaction timescales.
